tables: TRACE_INV_TRANS AS TRT INNER JOIN WORK_ORDER AS W ON dbo.sfnGetBaseFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID) = W.BASE_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetLOTIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '1') = W.LOT_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetSplitIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '0') = W.SPLIT_ID AND W.SUB_ID = '0'

TRACE_INV_TRANS AS TRT INNER JOIN WORK_ORDER AS W ON dbo.sfnGetBaseFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID) = W.BASE_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetLOTIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '1') = W.LOT_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetSplitIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '0') = W.SPLIT_ID AND W.SUB_ID = 0

TRACE_INV_TRANS AS TRT INNER JOIN [SQL-Lab-2].[LIVEARC].[dbo].WORK_ORDER AS W ON dbo.sfnGetBaseFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID) = W.BASE_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetLOTIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '1') = W.LOT_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetSplitIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '0') = W.SPLIT_ID AND W.SUB_ID = '0'

TRACE_INV_TRANS AS TRT INNER JOIN [SQL-Lab-2].[LIVEARC].[dbo].WORK_ORDER AS W ON dbo.sfnGetBaseFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID) = W.BASE_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetLOTIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '1') = W.LOT_ID AND ISNULL(dbo.sfnGetSplitIDFromTraceID(TRT.TRACE_ID), '0') = W.SPLIT_ID AND W.SUB_ID = 0
[sql-lab-2].[live].[dbo].[payable_line] AS apl(nolock) JOIN [sql-lab-2].[live].[dbo].[payable] AS ap ON apl.voucher_id = ap.voucher_id AND ap.pay_status <> 'x'
vq_operation AS vo1(nolock) JOIN vq_nonconformance AS ncm1(nolock) ON vo1.record_id = ncm1.operation_rec_id
vq_operation AS vo2(nolock) JOIN vq_nonconformance AS ncm2(nolock) ON vo2.record_id = ncm2.operation_rec_id
vq_operation AS vo3(nolock) JOIN vq_nonconformance AS ncm3(nolock) ON vo3.record_id = ncm3.operation_rec_id
